Interface Mensuration

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Implenments interface IMensuration to provide commercial basic mensuration services for the Esri Mensuration System.

[Guid("63AE4F70-BF55-480E-B2E0-49C5528BC4F2")]
public interface Mensuration : IMensuration
